name: GaugeFlow A11.0 periodic unlabeled-site automorphism audit v1
objective: Determine whether fixed-CIF atom-type labels for the InN/BN endpoint-ID panel are identifiable from unlabeled periodic geometry before implementing any A11 type decoder.

historical_evidence_is_immutable.instruction: A/A1/A2/A3/A4/A5/A6/A7/A8/A9/A10 reports, thresholds, splits, checkpoints and conclusions remain immutable. A11.0 is read-only and starts no training.

geometry.species_blind_structure: replace every site species with H before symmetry analysis
geometry.a11_g_representation_symmetry: O(3)-invariant because the pre-registered first geometry head uses distances and dot products only

decision_rules.all_full_o3_orbits_species_pure: Only then is a separately versioned A11-G geometry-only type-head protocol authorized.
decision_rules.any_full_o3_orbit_species_mixed: Do not interpret fixed-CIF site accuracy as an attainable deterministic O(3)-scalar target. A11-S/Q must jointly specify stochastic balanced assignment and automorphism-quotient supervision before training.
decision_rules.no_training: This audit cannot itself authorize tensor conditioning, full GaugeFlow, relaxation, DFT, or DFPT.
